titleStmt.title: SII 4.1327: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1327. (A.R. No. 405 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākābdēṁbudhivahnikhēṁdugaṇitē
saumyaśca vārē bhṛśaṁ . paṁcamyāṁ vilasatpradīpamanaghaḥ śrīsūryyanāmā pra
bhuḥ prādādbhīma mahēśvarāya ruciraṁ tauhaṁ jagaddīpanaḥ [. 1*] seṭṭidēvīti vikhyātā gaṁḍa
cilkapriyāṁgganā . bhaktyā ca bhīmanāthāya dattā dīpaṁ samujvalaṁ [. 2*] śakavarṣaṁbulu 1034
svasti . sarvvalōkāśraya śrīpritvīvalabha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka ra
vikulatilaka cōḍakulaśēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāśraya rājarājēṁdra vīra
maheṁdra vikramacōḍa vijayābharaṇa rājakēsarivarmma permmanaḍigalu gaṁgākāvērīpa
ryyaṁta saptamōviṣṇuvarddhanulaina tribhuvanacakravartti śrīkulōttuṁgacōḍadēvara pravarddha
mānavijayarājyasaṁvatsa 43 gu śrahini . svasti . sakalajananutaparamavaṁsōbava bharadvāja
gōtra vriṣabhalāṁccana kaḍuvapaṟegōṣaṇa khaṭvāṁgakētana lalitārddhacaṁdradhara kāṁccīpurēsvara naṁbi
kulatilaka yuddhatrinētra śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvarulaina bīragoṭṭamuna sūraparaju dēvi sejjamaku ga
ṁggagoṇḍacōḍavalanāṁṭi guddavadināṁṭi peddaḍākarēmi śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku riṣabhamāsamuna śuddhapakṣimuna pāḍya
yu budhavaramunaṇḍu veṭṭina yakhaṇḍavarttilōhapudiviya 1 ṇṭi dīnikiṁ beṭṭina modavulu 50 . dīniki nācaṁdrarkkamu neyu sariyiṁcuvārugā prōlabōla
yuṁ gāṭabhōla nāviyayu meṁṭana Eṟiyanayuṁ dalarasi nāviyayu berasina būṁṭagā prōlabhōla viya Aḍapuna
kommaya vasamunaṁ beṭṭina
Digital edition of SII 4.1327 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
